title: OCI Resource Destruction Spike (Anomaly Detection)
description: Identifies principals performing an abnormally high number of destructive operations (delete, terminate). A spike in resource destruction from a single user may indicate a compromised account performing sabotage, ransomware-style destruction, or an insider threat. Uses threshold-based anomaly detection (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Forecasting/Anomaly Detection method).
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ('Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*terminate*' or 'Event Type' like '*remove*') | stats count as destructive_actions, distinctcount('Event Type') as unique_action_types by 'User Name', 'Source IP' | where destructive_actions > 5 | sort -destructive_actions
